# Flashlight

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
torch, light, beam, emergency, safety, tool, bright

## Categories
photography, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/flashlight)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Flashlight;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Flashlight { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
